description: Structured command parity inventory used to generate coverage-summary tables and track keytip coverage expectations.

rows.name: Save (Ctrl+S)
rows.notes: Reuses current workbook path

rows.name: Print Preview
rows.notes: Honors paper/orientation/margins/headers/print area

rows.name: Export to PDF/XPS
rows.notes: Deterministic PDF export uses the existing print renderer and PDFsharp-WPF raster pages; active-sheet, selected-range, entire-visible-workbook, page-range, page-count validation, extensionless `.pdf` path normalization, and open-after-publish options are supported; requested PDF document properties embed workbook-name title plus Freexcel author/subject/keywords metadata; XPS export remains available with format-aware option summaries but does not embed the PDF metadata subset; selectable/vector PDF text and full Excel PDF publish options remain partial

rows.name: Options
rows.notes: General, Formulas, View, and Save subsets including calculation/error-checking and formula bar preferences

rows.name: Info panel
rows.notes: Protection/accessibility summary, workbook statistics, accessibility and formula-error counts, and file properties

rows.name: Share
rows.notes: Windows Share for saved local files; missing or unsaved local files route through Save As first; Microsoft 365 cloud links/coauthoring excluded

rows.name: Check In/Out
rows.notes: SharePoint workflow

rows.name: Online Templates
rows.notes: Microsoft online template discovery

rows.name: Open XLSX unsupported-feature warnings
rows.notes: Names VBA/Power Query/data model/etc.

rows.name: Account
rows.notes: Explains no Microsoft account integration

rows.name: Customize QAT
rows.notes: Low v1 value

rows.name: Cut (Ctrl+X)
rows.notes: Defers source clearing until non-overlapping paste, keeps an internal cut clipboard, and shows cut marquee state while pending

rows.name: Copy (Ctrl+C)
rows.notes: Copy marquee state

rows.name: Paste (Ctrl+V)
rows.notes: Internal values/formulas/formats/all and external text paste covered; unsupported external rich formats are intentionally plain-text

rows.name: Paste Special (values/formulas/formats/transpose/arithmetic/link/column-widths/picture)
rows.notes: Supported modes are undoable; external OLE/rich-object paste excluded

rows.name: Format Painter
rows.notes: Copies source formatting, including style-only cells and multi-cell format patterns, to target cells with undo; supports single-click and persistent double-click painter modes

rows.name: Font Size
rows.notes: Excel-range validated

rows.name: Full Border Gallery
rows.notes: Expanded preset gallery with remembered line color/style; interactive draw/erase border tools deferred

rows.name: Theme Colors
rows.notes: Preset color schemes plus Customize Colors entry point through the theme dialog; deep effects deferred

rows.name: Merge & Center
rows.notes: Undoable; F4 repeat

rows.name: Distributed/Justify alignment
rows.notes: Supported in style model, dialog, renderer, and XLSX IO

rows.name: Shrink to Fit
rows.notes: Supported in style model, dialog, renderer, and XLSX IO

rows.name: Format Cells Alignment dialog
rows.notes: Covers supported alignment model

rows.name: Custom Number Format
rows.notes: Broader Format Cells catalog plus editable custom format codes; supports invariant conditional sections for numbers and date/time values, named colors, default indexed `Color1`-through-`Color56` prefixes for numeric/date/text sections, escaped literals including escaped layout directive characters, date/time with long and compact AM/PM markers, contextual month/minute token handling across quoted literals, rounded clock and elapsed fractional seconds, elapsed-time, and text-section spacing/fill directive cleanup, variable decimals, fractions, scientific notation, elapsed time, comma scaling, visible currency symbols from LCID tokens, and deterministic decimal/group/date separators for modeled LCIDs `409`, `407`, `40C`, and `422`; unsupported full locale/LCID and workbook palette/theme overrides remain partial

rows.name: Full Excel locale/accounting fidelity
rows.notes: Invariant custom/accounting subset implemented; LCID currency symbols plus modeled numeric/date separators for `409`, `407`, `40C`, and `422` are preserved, and date/time/elapsed-time/text layout directives are cleaned; OS locale services, exact accounting layout widths, localized currency/accounting names, and full LCID variants remain partial

rows.name: Conditional Formatting
rows.notes: Most modeled rules; grid rendering covers cell value, formulas, above/below average, top/bottom, duplicate/unique, text, blank/nonblank, error/no-error, color scales, data bars, and visible 3/4/5-band icon sets with style-aware arrows, traffic lights, signs, symbols, flags, ratings, quarters, boxes, reverse/icons-only display, and authored percent/number thresholds; icon-set authoring/editing supports core OOXML styles with show/reverse options, the ribbon menu exposes grouped Directional/Shapes/Indicators/Ratings one-click presets plus More Rules, and the manager preserves advanced CF fields including Stop If True plus rules outside Current Selection; simplified rule manager remains partial

rows.name: Format as Table
rows.notes: Creates structured table metadata with generated headers, AutoFilter flag, style name, visible banding, one-step undo for table creation plus styling, and an Excel-scale Light/Medium/Dark gallery with swatch previews; command-level and XLSX-loaded table value filters hide non-matching data rows with multi-column AND, blank inclusion, and totals-row exclusion semantics; structured-reference formulas, totals-row calculations, and full table style theme semantics remain partial

rows.name: Cell Styles
rows.notes: Expanded built-in preset gallery backed by reusable `StyleDiff` planners; Accent 20% presets resolve against the active workbook theme; full workbook named-style semantics remain deferred

rows.name: AutoFit Row/Column
rows.notes: Measurement-based estimate over selected cells

rows.name: Format Cells dialog (Ctrl+1)
rows.notes: Covers supported Number/Alignment/Font/Fill/Border/Protection model

rows.name: Flash Fill
rows.notes: Expanded deterministic inference including common first-name/last-name contact patterns, shared-domain email generation, and first/last-initial email aliases; Excel's full ML-like inference remains partial

rows.name: Go To Special
rows.notes: Blanks/constants/formulas/comments/validation/visible

rows.name: Select Objects
rows.notes: Niche; drag handles deferred

rows.name: PivotTable
rows.notes: Creates from selected or cross-sheet source ranges on the current sheet or a new worksheet, refreshes existing PivotTables, supports command-level field layout/view/options/source changes including workbook-qualified source ranges, values-only and column-only layouts, nested row/column fields, Compact/Outline/Tabular report-layout state with Compact row-label rendering, top/bottom subtotals, calculated fields/items, date/number grouping, row/column label filters including comparison/between variants, row/column value filters with field targets including between/not-between and above/below-average variants, value/label sorting including column label/value sorting, multi-select page/row/column checked-item filters, Excel-style Show Values As modes including percent totals, running total, difference/% difference, rank, index, and parent-total variants with base field/item settings, common and statistical summary functions, built-in and custom workbook-catalog value-field number format IDs, broader built-in number-format preset catalog, and editable custom value-field format codes on materialized value cells, separate row/column grand-total controls, repeated-label/blank-line layout options, PivotTable style-name and style-option round-trip, GETPIVOTDATA lookups, Field List task pane with checkbox toggles and drag/drop reordering, field context-menu sort/select-items/label-filter/value-filter/clear/value-settings entry points, checkbox item-filter dialog, label/value filter dialogs, tabbed Value Field Settings dialog, contextual PivotTable Analyze/Design tabs, ribbon/double-click Show Details drill-down for item/subtotal/grand-total/matrix/column-only data cells, Insert Slicer/Insert Timeline authoring, active slicer and timeline filtering commands and pane controls for connected worksheet-range PivotTables, authored slicer/timeline state round-trip including cross-sheet source data and cache relationships, rendered header/subtotal/grand-total/row-stripe/column-stripe styles for built-in PivotStyle presets, and model-first XLSX load/save including refresh flags and shared-item metadata; exact full-gallery PivotStyle theme semantics, native slicer/timeline floating drawing object fidelity, full Excel number-format picker/catalog UI, and external/OLAP/data-model pivot cache behavior remain partial or excluded

rows.name: PivotChart
rows.notes: Inserts a bound chart from an existing PivotTable, supports bound PivotChart type changes while preserving the PivotTable connection, native `pivotSource` read/write and refresh binding implemented; renders PivotChart field buttons; field buttons open the same sort/filter/value-settings menu used by PivotTable fields; bound chart ranges stay synchronized after PivotTable layout/view changes; full PivotChart Tools layout/design editing remains partial

rows.name: Recommended PivotTables
rows.notes: AI/ML heuristics; proprietary

rows.name: Table
rows.notes: Creates structured table metadata with generated headers, AutoFilter flag, style name, visible banding, and one-step undo via the same path as Format as Table; the shared Format as Table gallery exposes Excel-scale Light/Medium/Dark style choices with swatch previews; table value filters execute for command and XLSX-loaded metadata; structured-reference formulas, totals-row calculations, and full table style theme semantics remain partial

rows.name: Shapes
rows.notes: Rectangle/ellipse/line

rows.name: Icons
rows.notes: Requires proprietary Microsoft icon library

rows.name: SmartArt
rows.notes: Retained as package part; no authoring

rows.name: Screenshot
rows.notes: OS-level feature (Win+Shift+S)

rows.name: Chart (stock/radar)
rows.notes: Model, ribbon insertion, renderer, and XLSX read/write paths implemented

rows.name: Chart (surface/treemap/sunburst/histogram/Pareto/box-and-whisker/waterfall/funnel/map/3D)
rows.notes: Recognized from XLSX where detected and blocked from broken authoring/rendering; lossless mixed drawing-part retention remains partial until per-family package writer support exists

rows.name: Recommended Charts
rows.notes: AI/ML heuristics; proprietary

rows.name: Comment/Note
rows.notes: Insert tab creates local threaded comments; Review tab also keeps simple note commands. Full threaded conversation/reply UI remains partial

rows.name: Interactive drag handles
rows.notes: Needs a dedicated object-selection/adornment layer; command-based size/rotation is implemented

rows.name: Crop
rows.notes: Image picture crop/reset is undoable, rendered, and persisted in native JSON and XLSX; interactive crop handles remain pending

rows.name: Gradients/Effects
rows.notes: Authored drawing shapes support two-color gradient fills and a shadow effect with undo plus native JSON/XLSX persistence; full Excel gallery/effect stack remains pending

rows.name: Themes (preset + custom dialog)
rows.notes: Presets plus custom theme dialog reachable from Themes, Theme Colors, Theme Fonts, and Theme Effects; deeper OOXML effects deferred

rows.name: Header/Footer editing
rows.notes: First/odd/even variants

rows.name: Create from Selection
rows.notes: Top/left/bottom/right label edges create sanitized, unique named ranges with undo; dialog choices and OK/Cancel expose access keys

rows.name: Trace Precedents
rows.notes: Multi-level arrows, offscreen markers

rows.name: Error Checking
rows.notes: Issue list plus ribbon entry point to error-checking options, including numbers stored as text, formulas referring to blank cells, two-digit-year text dates, formulas inconsistent with nearby formulas, SUM formulas omitting adjacent cells, and unlocked formula cells; partial rule taxonomy

rows.name: Refresh All
rows.notes: Recalc

rows.name: Advanced Filter
rows.notes: Criteria range supports AND/OR rows, copy-to output, unique records, and undo

rows.name: Forecast Sheet
rows.notes: Formula-based; no chart UI

rows.name: Flash Fill (Data tab)
rows.notes: Expanded deterministic inference including common first-name/last-name contact patterns, shared-domain email generation, and first/last-initial email aliases; Excel's full ML-like inference remains partial

rows.name: Spell Check
rows.notes: Broader known-corrections text-cell scan with casing-preserving replace, replace-all, ignore support, and internet/email/file-address span skipping; no full dictionary/proofing engine

rows.name: Thesaurus
rows.notes: Requires external dictionary service

rows.name: Accessibility Checker
rows.notes: Merged cells, missing/generic alt text, untitled charts, non-descriptive hyperlink text, default worksheet tab names, and hidden sheets/rows/columns with content; full Excel rule taxonomy remains partial

rows.name: New Comment
rows.notes: Threaded comment text can be added/edited/deleted locally through the Review ribbon and Ctrl+Shift+F2; full threaded conversation/reply UI remains partial

rows.name: New Note
rows.notes: Simple cell notes

rows.name: Edit Note
rows.notes: Reuses the note editor with existing note text preloaded

rows.name: Previous/Next Note
rows.notes: Navigates simple cell notes on the active sheet

rows.name: Show Notes
rows.notes: Opens a list of simple cell notes

rows.name: Allow Edit Ranges
rows.notes: Add, remove, and clear allowed ranges with undo support; partial permissions manager

rows.name: Share
rows.notes: Windows Share for saved local files; missing current paths route through Save As

rows.name: Threaded Comments
rows.notes: Local single-message threaded comment model, shortcut, navigation, delete command, and list display are supported; full Excel conversation/reply UI and cloud identity semantics remain partial

rows.name: Split Panes
rows.notes: Toggle clears frozen panes and supports independent split quadrants, draggable dividers, pane-specific scrollbars, wheel targeting, clipping, and active-state ribbon feedback

rows.name: Zoom
rows.notes: 10-400% range

rows.name: New Window
rows.notes: Insignificant / complex multi-window hosting

rows.name: Arrange All
rows.notes: Stores choice; no live multi-window

rows.name: View Side by Side
rows.notes: Insignificant / complex multi-window hosting

rows.name: Synchronous Scrolling
rows.notes: Insignificant / complex multi-window hosting

rows.name: Switch Windows
rows.notes: Insignificant / complex multi-window hosting
